sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26462" key="die/drion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διέδριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἕδρα</etym>) <sense id="n26462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seat for two persons,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
